description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.6 Docker image and caching the .apt and vendor directories. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script, export LC_ALL, LANG and LANGUAGE, echo $CI_PROJECT_DIR, set APT_DIR=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.apt and configure APT lists and archives paths, write these settings to /etc/apt/apt.conf, create the partial directories, run apt-get update -y and apt-get install -yq rsync, start ssh-agent, add the $SSH_KEY_ED25519 key, create ~/.ssh, set permissions, and disable strict host key checking. In the script, execute gem install bundler, bundle config set path 'vendor', bundle install, bundle exec jekyll build -d public, and rsync -av --delete public/ git@communitydocs.accessnow.org:./communitydocs. Publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact.
